raw_consumer_statement: I did a charge back on XX/XX/XXXX for a XXXX  transaction from XX/XX/XXXX. They processed it. Never heard back. Told me they sent me a letter, and then once I told them I never received a letter, they changed that to " well then it must have been electronic due to you being 'paperless ' ". Goes on to tell me they denied my charge back because I received the services from XXXX. But I did not receive the appropriate services, which is carpet installation WITHOUT harm to my personal property. XXXX damaged my trim to a point of no repair. They even sent their own people out to inspect and he advised they provide full reimbursement for the damages. They still refused to compensate. Therefore, we did not receive services as paid for. Citibank refuses to do the charge back.
